meaning: vt.回忆,回想,记起,取消n.召回
examples: Can you recall exactly what happened?
He tried to recall the layout of the farmhouse.
I recall many discussions with her on these and kindred topics.
Their authenticity is their strength and without them we could not recall and evidence the past.
In September 2013 his New York-based company issued a recall after its mold-tainted yogurt cups left hundreds ill.
